infos.name: cookery
infos.desc:
Guess what, you are in the place we're calling the cookery. I guess you better just go and list everything you see here.



You need an unblocked exit? You should try going east. There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unguarded.

infos.name: bedroom
infos.desc:
You arrive in a bedroom. A typical one.



There is an exit to the east. Don't worry, it is unguarded. There is an unguarded exit to the north.

infos.name: cellar
infos.desc:
Well, here we are in the cellar.



There is an exit to the east. Don't worry, it is unguarded. There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unblocked.

infos.name: dish-pit
infos.desc:
You find yourself in a dish-pit. A standard kind of place.



There is an exit to the west. Don't worry, it is unguarded.

infos.name: sauna
infos.desc:
I am sorry to announce that you are now in the sauna. The room is well lit.



You need an unguarded exit? You should try going south.

infos.name: coin
infos.desc: The coin would seem to be to fit in here

objective: I hope you're ready to go into rooms and interact with objects, because you've just entered TextWorld! First off, if it's not too much trouble, I need you to make an effort to travel south. With that done, take a trip east. Once you finish that, make an attempt to go to the east. Okay, and then, travel east. Then, pick-up the coin from the floor of the dish-pit. Alright, thanks!
